backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point for the ICP canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that all timer and duration-selector UI elements were removed from the game, with the game over condition now being lives-based only.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for the ZType falling-words arcade game.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file setting up Tailwind directives and defining light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main ZType falling-words arcade game component managing game state, word spawning, difficulty scaling, lives, scoring, combos, and rendering the HUD, starfield, falling words, and input bar—with all timer/duration UI removed.
frontend/src/components/FallingWord.tsx: React component that renders a single falling word with character-level highlighting for matched/remaining text and CSS classes for targeted, destroying, and missed states.
frontend/src/components/FloatingScorePop: Absolutely-positioned component that displays a floating '+N' score popup at a given (x, y) position with a CSS float-and-fade animation.
frontend/src/components/GameInputBar.tsx: Neon-styled input bar component showing the current target word hint with live match highlighting, an error flash state, and a styled text input field.
frontend/src/data/wordLists.ts: Exports tiered word lists (easy, medium, hard) and a getWordForLevel helper that selects words from the appropriate difficulty pool based on the current game level.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status derived from the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining a ZType-inspired deep-space dark theme with neon color variables, Tailwind directives, space background, starfield animations, and neon glow utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the game, including interfaces for falling words, score popups, combo notifications, game phases, and game stats.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with arcade/mono fonts, neon color tokens, glow box shadows, custom border radii, and keyframe animations for the gaming UI.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, summary, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for the ZType-inspired typing speed test web app.
